top_signals.title: Chipmaker Selloff Eases From Bear-Market Brink: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wild swings lashed chipmakers once again, with the high-profile group of shares briefly wiping out an earlier plunge to the edge of a bear market as dip buyers emerged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HollowByte DDoS flaw bloats OpenSSL server memory with 11-byte payload
top_signals.summary: A vulnerability dubbed HollowByte allows unauthenticated attackers to trigger a denial-of-service (DoS) condition on OpenSSL servers with a malicious payload of just 11 bytes. [...]
